specialRule.name: Raid and Pillage
specialRule.desc: Each time a DRUKHARI unit from your army destroys an enemy unit, if that enemy unit was within range of an objective marker controlled by your opponent at the start of the phase, you gain 1 Pain token. In addition, in your Command phase, you can select one objective marker you control that has one or more KABAL units from your army within range of it, then expend 1 Pain token from your Pain token pool. If you do, that objective is Secured by your army

enhancements.name: Dark Charisma
enhancements.desc: The bearer has an Objective Control characteristic of 5 and you can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for the bearer.

enhancements.name: Malevolent Cunning
enhancements.desc: The first time in each battle round that your opponent targets a unit from their army that is within 3" of the bearer with a Strategem, increase that Strategem's cost by 1CP for that usage.

specialRule.name: Appetite for Adulation
specialRule.desc: In the Fight phase, if two or more enemy units are destroyed by DRUKHARI units from your army that phase, you gain 1 Pain token. In addition, each time a WYCH CULT unit from your army becomes Empowered in the Fight phase, until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [ANTI-INFANTRY 4+] ability.

enhancements.name: Stimm-Fervour
enhancements.desc: The bearer is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

enhancements.name: Blood-Drenched Champion
enhancements.desc: In the Battle-shock step of your opponents Command Phase, for each enemy unit that is below it's Starting Strength and is within Engagement Range of the bearer, that unit must take a Battle-shock test. If that enemy unit is also below Half-strength, subtract 1 from that test. This Enhancement cannot cause a unit to take two Battle-shock tests in the same phase.

specialRule.name: Regenerative Agony
specialRule.desc: Each time four or more Feel No Pain rolls are successful for HAEMONCULUS COVENS models from your army in a single phase, you gain 1 Pain token. In addition, each battle round, the first time a HAEMONCULUS COVENS unit from your army becomes Empowered in that battle round, roll one D6: on a 2-5, one model in that unit regains 1 lost wound, or if that unit has the WRACKS keyword, one destroyed model is returned to it with it's full wounds remaining; on a 6, one model in that unit regains up to two lost wounds or if that unit has the WRACKS keyword, one destroyed model is returned to it with it's full wounds remaining.

enhancements.name: Rending Chain-Flails
enhancements.desc: Each time an enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer is selected to Fall Back, roll one D6: on a 2-4, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound, on a 5+, that enemy unit suffers 2 mortal wounds.

enhancements.name: Vile Surgeon
enhancements.desc: The bearer's Haemonculus tools and scissorhands have a Damage characteristic of 3 while targeting CHARACTER units.

specialRule.name: Commorrite Rivalries
specialRule.desc: Each time a DRUKHARI CHARACTER model from your army destroys an enemy CHARACTER model, you gain 1 Pain token. In addition, each time you use the Battlefield Command Stratagem, you can expend 1 Pain token from your Pain token pool. If you do, decrease that Stratagem's cost by 1CP for that usage.

enhancements.name: Power and Greed
enhancements.desc: The first time in each turn that the bearer is Empowered, roll one D6: on a 3+, you gain 1 Pain token.

enhancements.name: Spiteful Demise
enhancements.desc: When the bearer is destroyed, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, do not remove it from play. The bearer can fight after the attacking unit has finished making it's attacks, and is then removed from play.

keywordRatios.description: Archon cannot be selected unless one or more Kabalite Warriors units are included.
Haemonculus cannot be selected unless one or more Wracks units are included.
Succubus cannot be selected unless one or more Wyches units are included.
Lelith Hesperax cannot be selected unless one or more Wyches units are included.

units.name: Archon
units.rulesAdaptations: This unit loses the Devious Mastermind ability.

units.name: Kabalite Warriors
units.rulesAdaptations: This unit loses the Sadistic Raiders ability.

units.name: Mandrakes
units.rulesAdaptations: This unit loses the Fade Away ability.

units.name: Lelith Hesperax
units.rulesAdaptations: This unit loses the Thrilling Spectacle ability.
